title: Flea Treatment in Bellmore, NY | $350 - $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Bellmore, Long Island. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for a quote!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Bellmore home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Bellmore and Long Island, with pricing ranging from $350 to $650 depending on property size and infestation severity. Our experienced technicians use safe, effective methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages and prevent future outbreaks.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Bellmore residents for years with reliable, same-day flea extermination services. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Long Island properties and use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for your family and pets while effectively eliminating fleas from your home.
localContext: Bellmore's tree-lined streets, beautiful homes near Bellmore Creek, and proximity to parks like Newbridge Road Park create ideal conditions for flea populations, especially in households with pets. Whether you live in one of the classic homes near the LIRR station or in the family-friendly neighborhoods near Shore Road, our team provides prompt flea treatment services to protect your property.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Bellmore?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Bellmore typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, because flea eggs can continue to hatch, complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks and may require follow-up treatments to break the flea life cycle completely.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours after application, or until surfaces are completely dry. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions during service.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Bellmore home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation improves treatment effectiveness. We recommend vacuuming thoroughly, washing all pet bedding, removing pet toys and food bowls, and ensuring pets are treated by a veterinarian. Our team will provide a detailed preparation checklist when you schedule your appointment.
